vocab.example: I view photographing old structures as a form of visual storytelling, capturing the history etched into their walls.

vocab.meaning: sự đối xứng và tỉ lệ
vocab.example: I am particularly drawn to neoclassical architecture because of its emphasis on perfect symmetry and proportion.
At dusk, the skyscrapers transform into abstract silhouettes against the glowing sky, which is my favorite time to take photos.
Photography gives me an excuse for urban exploration, discovering hidden architectural gems in the forgotten corners of the city.
I often use a unique spire or a grand entrance as the focal point of my architectural compositions.

vocab.meaning: gợi lên cảm giác hoài cổ
vocab.example: Taking photos of crumbling colonial buildings can evoke a powerful sense of nostalgia for a bygone era.

vocab.meaning: vẻ hùng vĩ/đồ sộ của các khối kiến trúc khổng lồ
vocab.example: The camera lens is perfect for capturing the monolithic grandeur of the city's newest sports stadium.
I love shooting down narrow alleys between high-rises to create a dramatic effect using the vanishing point.

vocab.meaning: công việc xây đá/gạch tinh xảo
vocab.example: Close-up shots are essential to highlight the intricate masonry and craftsmanship of these centuries-old cathedrals.
Whenever I travel, I make it a point to document the local architectural heritage through my lens.
